title: ‘Geldof started flicking Vs at Farage’: the story of the Brexit campaign, told by those with a front-row seat
summary_full: How five months in 2016 that encompassed Boris Johnson siding with Vote Leave, Jo Cox’s murder and David Cameron’s resignation shaped the UK’s futureDavid Cameron, having promised in 2013 that a future Conservative government would offer a referendum on Britain’s membership of the EU, announces the date of the vote: 23 June 2016. The next day, Boris Johnson,  then the mayor of London, says he will campaign for leave. Continue reading...
